creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you use NLS_USE=gettext is correct?


=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
/!\ zoinks-0.4.1: Makefile errors /!\

USE_GETTEXT is unsupported, please use USES=gettext

*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/zoinks




> make -V USE_GETTEXT
gettext

So the sanity check failure is real.
